name: Bisquick Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Blueberries, fresh or frozen (thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease the bottoms only of 12 medium muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the egg slightly. Stir in the remaining ingredients except blueberries until moistened.
4. Gently fold in the blueberries into the batter.
5. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
6. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown.
